description: Two photos of a healthy tall fescue lawn in early fall in Raleigh NC. Tests that the AI gives appropriate fall maintenance guidance without inventing corrective issues.

photos.caption: Overhead view of uniformly green tall fescue lawn at 3.5-inch height with dense, clump-free coverage.
Close-up of tall fescue leaf blades showing healthy medium-green color and broad-bladed texture characteristic of tall fescue.

profile.notes: Front yard, kept mowed at 3.5 inches, no problems noted. Lawn is coming out of summer well.
profile.currentRoutine: Mow weekly at 3.5 inches, water twice a week, planning fall overseeding touch-up in thin areas.

groundTruth.photoNotes: Two views of a healthy tall fescue lawn in early fall. Dense, uniform green coverage at appropriate mowing height. No visible disease, weeds, pest damage, or drought stress.
